title: Wholesome Crunchy Argentinian Chorizo Salad
description: A mustardy, crunchy salad featuring Argentine chorizo, Pecorino Romano, and toasted almonds for a high-protein meal-prep dish.
instructions: In a skillet over medium heat, brown 200g of sliced chorizo until crisp, about 8 minutes.
While chorizo cooks, toast 30g of almonds in a dry pan until fragrant, 3-4 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine 200g mixed salad greens, 150g halved cherry tomatoes, and 50g thinly sliced red onion.
Add the cooked chorizo and toasted almonds to the bowl, then sprinkle 50g grated pecorino romano.
Whisk 2 tbsp dijon mustard, 2 tbsp olive oil, and 1 tbsp balsamic vinegar until emulsified.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss until all ingredients are evenly coated.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes before serving.
